title: How to remove the Beagle/Bagle virus-trojan?
body: I assumed that viruses didn't get into my computer because I didn't execute anything that didn't give me confidence. It had been many years since my PC had been infected but yesterday I downloaded a program through Emule that allegedly was a remote desktop... I didn't scan it (stupid!!) and this malicious virus got in that slows down the system, prevents you from connecting to the internet, you can't run Windows (XP) in safe mode, ... and some other things ... the **Bagle Trojan** (trojan-downloader.Win32.bagle) ... It took me a while to detect what virus it was because the antivirus didn't work and I couldn't access online antivirus, but after hours I identified it and reached [this page](http://es.kioskea.net/faq/sujet-447-como-eliminar-el-virus-beagle-bagle#1er-metodo-elibagla) which I recommend to you. I am still cleaning, lucky that I have more than one computer and can continue working.
